title: Darcy Battery Management System
subtitle: Battery management and power distribution schematic package for Darcy avionics
role: Schematic design, responsible engineering, and PCB layout design
stackup: Stackup to be added from Altium exports
summary: A Darcy battery management system schematic package covering top-level architecture, power, load switching, ADC measurement, connector load switches, and current-loop circuitry.
mainConstraints: Manage battery and distribution behavior with clear power-path documentation
Keep load switch channels consistent and reviewable
Expose measurement and current-loop interfaces for validation
Document the design from exported Altium artifacts without parsing raw files
publicNote: This project is derived from the exported Altium schematic PDF only. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.

model3d.title: Darcy BMS 3D Model
model3d.description: Add an Altium STEP export under content/projects/darcy-battery-management-system/model to replace the interactive placeholder.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: The exported Altium schematic PDF for the Darcy battery management system.
